pi_items.source: Fiji sample images directory (imagej.net/ij/images/FluorescentCells.zip), accessed 2026-03-07. File property verified via PIL image inspection.

pi_items.metadata_value: Fiji built-in sample (File > Open Samples > Fluorescent Cells)
pi_items.verified_value: Fiji built-in sample accessible via File > Open Samples > Fluorescent Cells (400K)
pi_items.source: Official ImageJ documentation (imagej.net/plugins/samples) confirms samples are registered in File > Open Samples menu. Direct download from imagej.net/ij/images/ confirms availability.

pi_items.verified_value: 3-channel composite image (8-bit, 3 frames). Stored internally as indexed/palette mode in TIFF, but described by ImageJ as a 3-channel composite that can be converted to RGB format.
pi_items.source: PIL Image inspection shows image_mode='P' (palette), but TIFF tag 262 (PhotometricInterpretation)=3 (RGB). ImageJ metadata (tag 270) states '3 channel, 8-bit composite image'. ImageJ can convert to RGB using Image>Color>Stack to RGB command.

pi_items.verified_value: ["Red (Texas Red X-Phalloidin, F-Actin)", "Green (Bodipy FL, Tubulin)", "Blue (DAPI, Nucleus)"]
pi_items.source: ImageJ embedded metadata (TIFF tag 50839) decoded from file. Full text: 'Blue: nucleus stained with DAPI. Green: Tubulin stained with Bodipy FL goat anti-mouse IgG. Red: F-Actin stained with Texas Red X-Phalloidin.' Source: Molecular Probes demo slide data embedded in FluorescentCells.tif file from official Fiji samples (dated 04-03-2008).

pi_items.verified_value: Approximately 5-13 nuclei (cell count varies by thresholding method)
pi_items.source: Connected component analysis on DAPI (blue) channel using multiple thresholding methods. Percentile-based thresholding (75th-90th percentile) with size filtering (>100 pixels) yields 12-13 valid nuclei. Standard deviation-based thresholding yields 5-10 nuclei depending on threshold. Estimate is conservative but reasonable; actual count depends on morphology-based filtering which is not applied here.

pi_items.verified_value: Minimum observed thresholded area: approximately 30,000+ pixels (for red F-Actin channel)
pi_items.source: Image analysis using multiple thresholding approaches: mean+std threshold yields ~34,700 pixels for channel 0 (red). Actual biological signal is dense throughout cells, making pixel areas substantially larger than minimum claim.

pi_items.verified_value: Observed maximum thresholded area: approximately 40,000-50,000 pixels depending on threshold
pi_items.source: Image analysis of red channel shows thresholded areas consistently between 30,000-50,000 pixels using standard threshold methods. Maximum claim of 80,000 pixels is conservative and accommodates various thresholding strategies.

pi_items.verified_value: Minimum observed thresholded area: approximately 40,000+ pixels (for green Tubulin channel)
pi_items.source: Image analysis shows green channel (channel 1) with thresholded area of ~40,436 pixels using mean+std threshold. Similar to red channel, actual signal is distributed throughout cells.

pi_items.verified_value: Observed maximum thresholded area: approximately 40,000-50,000 pixels depending on threshold
pi_items.source: Green channel analysis shows areas in the range of 40,000-50,000 pixels. Maximum claim of 80,000 pixels is conservative.

Standard definition of Pearson correlation coefficient (r), Manders' overlap coefficients (M1, M2), and intersection-over-union (IoU), all of which have ranges [0,1] or [-1,1] for correlation. Documented in ImageJ colocalization analysis references (imagej.net/imaging/colocalization-analysis).
Cannot be verified without executing the task in the environment. This is a runtime output location specified in task.json hooks.

privileged_info_summary: The Fluorescent Cells sample image is a real, published microscopy image from a Molecular Probes demo slide (bovine pulmonary artery endothelial cells, approximately 5-13 cells/nuclei visible). It is a 512x512 pixel, 3-channel 8-bit composite image stored in Fiji's built-in samples. However, the channel descriptions in task.json are incorrect: the red channel is stained with Texas Red X-Phalloidin (not rhodamine), the green channel is stained with Bodipy FL (not FITC), and the blue channel is correctly identified as DAPI. The expected measurement ranges (1000-80000 pixels for channel areas) are conservative but achievable with standard thresholding methods; actual observed thresholded areas are 30000-50000 pixels depending on threshold selection. The colocalization coefficient range of 0.0 to 1.0 is correct for standard metrics.
